description: The system shall allow a user to create an account using an email address and a password.
The system shall send a unique email verification link to the user immediately after successful registration.
The system shall allow the user to request a resend of the verification email, with a cooldown of 60 seconds between requests.
The system shall block account creation attempts from a single IP address after 5 failed attempts within a 15-minute rolling window.
The system shall block resend verification email requests for a specific account or IP after 3 attempts within 1 hour, and temporarily disable this feature for 30 minutes.
The system shall prevent a user from logging in for the first time until their email address has been verified.
Each email address used for registration must be unique across all accounts.
The email verification link sent to the user shall expire 24 hours after it is issued.
The system shall block disposable email providers during registration.
Password length must be between 8 and 64 characters.
Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one digit, and one special character (e.g., @, #, $).
Password must not contain personally identifiable information such as the user's name.
Email format must conform to a simplified RFC 5322 standard.
If a user attempts to register with an email that already exists, the system shall display the error message: 'Email này đã được đăng ký. Vui lòng đăng nhập hoặc sử dụng email khác.'
If the password does not meet length or complexity requirements, the system shall display the error message: 'Mật khẩu phải có độ dài từ 8 đến 64 ký tự.'
If the email format is invalid, the system shall display the error message: 'Địa chỉ email không đúng định dạng. Vui lòng kiểm tra lại.'
Email verification functionality depends on an external email delivery service.
Blocking disposable email providers depends on an up-to-date list or third-party service of known disposable domains.
